speckit.name: Speckit Steering Cycle
speckit.description: Runs the steering flow through specification, dependency wiring, critique, issue sync, checkpoint, and implementation.

speckit-quality.name: Speckit Quality Gates
speckit-quality.description: Runs post-implementation quality gates: verify-tasks → verify → review → cleanup → sync → sync-conflicts → retro → checkpoint.

speckit-full.name: Speckit Full Steering Cycle
speckit-full.description: Runs the full steering flow from specification through dependency sync, implementation, verification, review, cleanup, conflict checks, retrospective, and checkpoint.
